productDisplayName: Clarks Men Vieri Deck Leather Black Sandals
description: Comfortable and stylish, this Vieri Deck leather slipper from clarks is a must-have in your wardrobe.UpperLeather forefoot cross straps with cushioned suede leather footbed for all-day comfortStitch detailing for durable comfort and styleBranding on the heel with ergonomic grooves on the footbed Footbed stitched to the outsole for durability OutsoleDurable rubber outsole with multi-directional grooves for absolute grip and tractionCareClean the leather with a leather brushClean the suede footbed using a suede brushDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
